# llms-full.txt — Extended Version

> This is the extended version with full descriptions. See llms.txt for the compact version.

# Telnyx Code Examples

> 207 production-ready Python examples for building on the Telnyx AI communications platform. Voice AI, SMS, SIP, inference, IoT, conferencing, cloud storage, edge compute — every major product surface with working code.

## What is Telnyx?

Telnyx is AI communications infrastructure. One platform for voice, messaging, SIP trunking, AI inference (LLM), text-to-speech, speech-to-text, phone numbers, IoT/SIM, cloud storage, and edge compute. Single API key, single bill. Telnyx owns its IP network in 60+ countries — inference, TTS, and telephony run on the same infrastructure with no inter-vendor network hops.

## Why Telnyx for Voice AI?

Building voice AI agents with multiple vendors (Twilio for telephony + Deepgram for STT + OpenAI for LLM + ElevenLabs for TTS) adds 200-400ms of inter-vendor latency. Telnyx runs all stages on the same network: typical voice AI round-trip is under 500ms vs 1,000ms+ with multi-vendor stacks. TTS is 10x cheaper than ElevenLabs. SIP trunking is 3x cheaper than Twilio.

## Quick Links

- [Full Repository](https://github.com/team-telnyx/telnyx-code-examples)
- [Telnyx Developer Docs](https://developers.telnyx.com)
- [API Reference](https://developers.telnyx.com/api)
- [Sign Up](https://portal.telnyx.com/sign-up)
- [API Keys](https://portal.telnyx.com/api-keys)
- [Telnyx vs Twilio Comparison](guides/telnyx-vs-twilio.md)

## Voice AI (72 examples)

- [Abandoned Cart Recovery](https://github.com/team-telnyx/telnyx-code-examples/tree/main/abandoned-cart-recovery-python): SMS 1h after abandon with incentive, AI voice call 24h later if no purchase. Integrates with Shopify webhooks and Stripe [Voice, AI Inference, Messaging]
- [Accounting Firm Tax Season Line](https://github.com/team-telnyx/telnyx-code-examples/tree/main/accounting-tax-season-line-python): Handles scheduling, document checklist reminders, status updates. AI texts clients with missing doc reminders. CPA revie [Voice, AI Inference, Messaging]
- [After-Hours Nurse Triage](https://github.com/team-telnyx/telnyx-code-examples/tree/main/after-hours-nurse-triage-python): AI screens symptoms using clinical decision tree, routes urgent to on-call nurse via PagerDuty, queues non-urgent for AM [Voice, AI Inference, Messaging]
- [AI After-Hours Emergency Triage](https://github.com/team-telnyx/telnyx-code-examples/tree/main/ai-after-hours-emergency-triage-python): AI After-Hours Emergency Triage — after-hours calls screened by AI. True emergencies get forwarded to on-call; everythin [Voice AI, AI Inference]
- [AI Appointment Reminder](https://github.com/team-telnyx/telnyx-code-examples/tree/main/ai-appointment-reminder-sms-voice-python): AI Appointment Reminder — SMS first, voice call for non-responders, AI handles rescheduling. [SMS/MMS, Voice, AI Inference]
- [AI Billing Dispute Resolution Agent](https://github.com/team-telnyx/telnyx-code-examples/tree/main/ai-billing-dispute-resolution-agent-python): AI Billing Dispute Resolution Agent — handles billing questions with account lookup. [Voice AI, AI Inference]
- [AI Cold Caller Objection Trainer](https://github.com/team-telnyx/telnyx-code-examples/tree/main/ai-cold-caller-objection-trainer-python): AI Cold Caller Objection Trainer — practice handling sales objections with AI-generated scenarios. [Voice, AI Inference]
- [AI Compliance Quiz Phone](https://github.com/team-telnyx/telnyx-code-examples/tree/main/ai-compliance-quiz-phone-python): AI Compliance Quiz Phone — employees call and take a compliance quiz. AI asks questions, evaluates answers, scores pass/ [Voice AI, AI Inference]
- [AI Conference Moderator](https://github.com/team-telnyx/telnyx-code-examples/tree/main/ai-conference-moderator-python): AI moderator for multi-party calls. Manages agenda, enforces time limits, tracks speakers, produces structured summary w [Voice, AI Inference, Conferencing]

## Voice (35 examples)

- [AI-Powered IVR Replacement](https://github.com/team-telnyx/telnyx-code-examples/tree/main/ai-powered-ivr-replacement-python): AI-Powered IVR Replacement — natural language routing with A/B testing and structured insights. [Voice AI, AI Assistants]

[Voice, Conferencing]

- [Production-ready Flask application for call forwarding via Telnyx Voice API.](https://github.com/team-telnyx/telnyx-code-examples/tree/main/call-forwarding-python): Forward inbound calls to mobile, office, or on-call numbers with time-based routing rules. [Voice]
- [Call Queue with Hold Music](https://github.com/team-telnyx/telnyx-code-examples/tree/main/call-queue-with-hold-music-python): Call Queue with Hold Music — queue callers with position announcements and hold music, route to agents. [Cloud Storage, Voice]
- [Production-ready Flask application for Whisper-based call prompts via Telnyx.](https://github.com/team-telnyx/telnyx-code-examples/tree/main/call-whisper-monitoring-python): Monitor live calls with silent listen, whisper coaching to agents, and barge-in capability. - [Number Lookup Fraud Screener](https://github.com/team-telnyx/telnyx-code-examples/tree/main/number-lookup-fraud-screener-python): Number Lookup Fraud Screener — screen inbound calls/messages for fraud indicators using number lookup before connecting. [Voice AI, Number Lookup]
- [Payment Reminder Escalation](https://github.com/team-telnyx/telnyx-code-examples/tree/main/payment-reminder-escalation-python): Invoice overdue: day 1 SMS, day 7 voice call with payment link, day 14 escalation to collections with full context. Inte [Voice, Messaging]
- [Programmable Hold Experience](https://github.com/team-telnyx/telnyx-code-examples/tree/main/programmable-hold-experience-python): Programmable Hold Experience — custom hold experiences: tips, trivia, estimated wait time, callback offers. [Cloud Storage, Voice]
- [Production-ready Flask application for call recording via Telnyx Voice API.](https://github.com/team-telnyx/telnyx-code-examples/tree/main/record-phone-calls-python): Record inbound and outbound calls with dual-channel audio, pause/resume, and cloud storage. [Voice, Call Recording]
- [Rent Collection Escalation](https://github.com/team-telnyx/telnyx-code-examples/tree/main/rent-collection-escalation-python): Automated multi-channel rent reminders. Day 1: SMS + Stripe payment link. Day 3: voice call. Day 7: late fee notice. Day [Voice, Messaging]
- [Production-ready Flask webhook for handling inbound calls via Telnyx Voice API.](https://github.com/team-telnyx/telnyx-code-examples/tree/main/route-phone-calls-to-ai-agent-python): Route inbound phone calls to a Telnyx AI Assistant with automatic speech recognition and natural language responses. - [Shift Fill Engine](https://github.com/team-telnyx/telnyx-code-examples/tree/main/shift-fill-engine-python): Open shift triggers calls down the availability list. First to confirm gets it, rest are cancelled. Texts confirmation + [Voice, Messaging]
- [Smart IVR A/B Tester](https://github.com/team-telnyx/telnyx-code-examples/tree/main/smart-ivr-ab-tester-python): Smart IVR A/B Tester — run two IVR flows simultaneously and track which converts better. [Voice]
- [Production-ready SMS autoresponder using Telnyx webhooks.](https://github.com/team-telnyx/telnyx-code-examples/tree/main/sms-auto-reply-bot-python): Keyword-triggered SMS auto-responder with configurable reply templates and analytics. [SMS/MMS, Voice]

## Verify (6 examples)

- [Branded Caller ID Manager](https://github.com/team-telnyx/telnyx-code-examples/tree/main/branded-caller-id-manager-python): Branded Caller ID Manager — register, manage, and verify branded calling profiles with STIR/SHAKEN attestation for highe [Branded Calling, CNAM Lookup, Verify]
- [Missions Workflow Orchestrator](https://github.com/team-telnyx/telnyx-code-examples/tree/main/missions-workflow-orchestrator-python): Orchestrate multi-step Telnyx Missions workflows with task dependencies, error handling, and status tracking. [SMS/MMS, Verify, Number Porting]
- [Production-ready OTP 2FA system with Flask and Telnyx SMS.](https://github.com/team-telnyx/telnyx-code-examples/tree/main/sms-two-factor-auth-python): Send and verify OTP codes via SMS with rate limiting, expiration, and retry logic. [Cloud Storage, SMS/MMS, Verify]
- [Production-ready Flask application for device location](https://github.com/team-telnyx/telnyx-code-examples/tree/main/track-iot-device-location-python): Production-ready Flask application for device location tracking via Telnyx IoT API. [IoT/SIM, Verify]
- [Verify Multi-Channel Auth](https://github.com/team-telnyx/telnyx-code-examples/tree/main/verify-multi-channel-auth-python): Verify Multi-Channel Auth — multi-channel verification: SMS first, fallback to voice call, then WhatsApp. Cascading 2FA. [Verify, WhatsApp]
- [Verify Phone Number OTP Flow](https://github.com/team-telnyx/telnyx-code-examples/tree/main/verify-phone-number-otp-flow-python): Verify Phone Number OTP Flow — Telnyx Verify API with SMS primary and voice call fallback. [Verify]

## Migration (3 examples)

- [Migrate from ElevenLabs](https://github.com/team-telnyx/telnyx-code-examples/tree/main/migrate-from-elevenlabs-python): Migrate from ElevenLabs — import ElevenLabs voice configurations to Telnyx TTS with voice mapping and cost comparison. [AI Assistants, Migration]
- [Migrate from Twilio](https://github.com/team-telnyx/telnyx-code-examples/tree/main/migrate-from-twilio-python): Migrate from Twilio — complete Twilio-to-Telnyx migration tool: numbers, messaging profiles, voice apps, and webhook con [Migration, Number Porting, SMS/MMS, Voice]
- [Migrate from Vapi](https://github.com/team-telnyx/telnyx-code-examples/tree/main/migrate-from-vapi-python): Migrate from Vapi — import Vapi voice agents to Telnyx AI Assistants with voice, prompt, and tool configuration mapping. [Migration]

## Platform (4 examples)

- [Ai Real Time Translation Bridge](https://github.com/team-telnyx/telnyx-code-examples/tree/main/ai-real-time-translation-bridge-python)
- [E911 Address Validator](https://github.com/team-telnyx/telnyx-code-examples/tree/main/e911-address-validator-python): Validate and provision E911 emergency addresses via the Telnyx API. [E911]
- [Porting Order Tracker Dashboard](https://github.com/team-telnyx/telnyx-code-examples/tree/main/porting-order-tracker-dashboard-python)
- [x402 USDC Account Funder](https://github.com/team-telnyx/telnyx-code-examples/tree/main/x402-usdc-account-funder-python): X402 USDC Account Funder — fund your Telnyx account with USDC cryptocurrency on the Base blockchain. [x402 Payments]

## Coverage Summary

- **207 total examples** across 18 product categories
- Every example includes: `app.py`, `README.md` (YAML frontmatter), `GUIDE.md` (tutorial), `API.md` (endpoint reference), `.env.example`
- All examples use Flask, Python 3.8+, and the Telnyx REST API
- 42 examples connect 3+ Telnyx products in a single application
- Voice AI examples use Telnyx Call Control webhooks (event-driven state machine)
- AI Inference examples use the OpenAI-compatible `/v2/ai/chat/completions` endpoint
